setting.help: Choose the layout of your documents
Customize the look and feel of automated emails
Automatically generate counterpart documents for orders/invoices between companies
setting.title: Configure company rules to automatically create SO/PO when one of your company sells/buys to another of your company.

div.div: Savethis page and come back here to set up the feature.

setting.help: Define your weight unit of measure
Define your volume unit of measure
Configure your activity types
Configure your own email servers
setting.title: Using your own email server is required to send/receive emails in Community and Enterprise versions. Online users already benefit from a ready-to-use email server (@mycompany.odoo.com).

setting.help: Use different domains for your mail aliases
Insert dynamic Google Maps in your email templates
Send and receive emails through your Gmail account.
Send and receive emails through your Outlook account.

div.div: Savethis page and come back here to set up the feature.

setting.help: Add your twilio credentials for ICE servers
Configure your ICE server list for webRTC
Restrict mail templates edition and QWEB placeholders usage.
Add a Tenor GIF API key to enable GIFs support.
Select the content filter used for filtering GIFs
Fetch up to the specified number of GIF.
Google Translate Integration
Add new users as recipient of a periodic email with key metrics
setting.name: digest_email_setting_container
setting.title: New users are automatically added as recipient of the following digest email.

setting.help: Send texts to your contacts
Automatically enrich your contact base with company data
setting.title: When populating your address book, Odoo provides a list of matching companies. When selecting one item, the company data and logo are auto-filled.

setting.help: View your IAP Services and recharge your credits
Enable password reset from Login page
Set custom access rights for new users
setting.title: By default, new users get highest access rights for all installed apps.

setting.help: API Keys allow your users to access Odoo with external tools when multi-factor authentication is enabled.
Allow users to import data from CSV/XLS/XLSX/ODS files
Add fun feedback and motivate your employees
This name will be used for the application when Odoo is installed through the browser.
Integrate with mail client plugins
Get product pictures using Barcode

div.div: Savethis page and come back here to set up the feature.

setting.help: Use external accounts to log in (Google, Facebook, etc.)

div.div: Savethis page and come back here to set up the feature.

setting.help: Use LDAP credentials to log in

div.div: Savethis page and come back here to set up the feature.

setting.help: Find free high-resolution images from Unsplash
GeoLocalize your partners

div.name: base_geolocalize_warning
div.div: Savethis page and come back here to choose your Geo Provider.

setting.help: Protect your forms from spam and abuse. If no keys are provided, no checks will be done.
Protect your forms with CF Turnstile.

div.div: Savethis page and come back here to set up Cloudflare turnstile.

setting.help: Enable the profiling tool. Profiling may impact performance while being active.
Manage & publish a schedule with tracks
setting.title: Add a navigation menu to your event web pages with schedule, tracks, a track proposal form, etc.

div.span: Air your tracks online through a Youtube integration
Share a quiz to your attendees once a track is over

setting.help: Foster interactions between attendees by creating virtual conference rooms
Display Sponsors and Exhibitors on your event pages
Create Booths and manage their reservations
Sell tickets with sales orders
Sell tickets on your website
setting.name: event_settings_website

setting.help: Enable barcode scanning
Define recurring plans and revenues on Opportunities
Add a qualification step before the creation of an opportunity
setting.title: Use leads if you need a qualification step before creating an opportunity or a customer. It can be a business card you received, a contact form filled in your website, or a file of unqualified prospects you import, etc. Once qualified, the lead can be converted into a business opportunity and/or a new customer in your address book.

setting.help: Assign salespersons into multiple Sales Teams.

setting.name: predictive_lead_setting_container
setting.title: This can be used to compute statistical probability to close a lead
setting.div: The success rate is computed based onfor the leads created as of the.

setting.title: This can be used to automatically assign leads to sales persons based on rules

div.span: Periodically assign leads based on rules
All sales teams will use this setting by default unless specified otherwise.

setting.help: Enrich your leads with company data based on their email addresses
Generate new leads based on their country, industry, size, etc.
Convert visitors of your website into leads and perform data enrichment based on their IP address
Sell variants of a product using attributes (size, color, etc.)
Add several variants to an order from a grid
Sell and purchase products in different units of measure
Send a product-specific email once the invoice is validated
setting.title: Sending an email is useful if you need to share specific information or content about a product (instructions, rules, links, media, etc.). Create and set the email template from the product detail form (in Accounting tab).

setting.help: Sell products by multiple of unit # per package
setting.title: Ability to select a package type in sales orders and to force a quantity that is a multiple of the number of units per package.

setting.help: Grant discounts on sales order lines
setting.title: Apply manual discounts on sales order lines or display discounts computed from pricelists (option to activate in the pricelist configuration).

setting.help: Manage Promotions, coupons, loyalty cards, Gift cards & eWallet
setting.title: Boost your sales with multiple kinds of programs: Coupons, Promotions, Gift Card, Loyalty. Specific conditions can be set (products, customers, minimum purchase amount, period). Rewards can be discounts (% or amount) or free products.

setting.help: Set multiple prices per product, automated discounts, etc.
Let your customers log in to see their documents
setting.title: To send invitations in B2B mode, open a contact or select several ones in list view and click on 'Portal Access Management' option in the dropdown menu *Action*.

setting.help: Show margins on orders
setting.title: The margin is computed as the sum of product sales prices minus the cost set in their detail form.

setting.help: Default values used when creating new quotations. Those can still be changed on each quotation.
setting.div: Default values will be overwritten by values provided by the quotation template.

div.div: Request an online signature to confirm orders
Request an online prepayment from your customers to confirm orders. You can ask them to fully pay the order or partially with a downpayment
Prepayment amount

div.title: Days between quotation proposal and expiration. 0 days means automatic expiration is disabled
div.div: days

setting.help: Create standardized offers with default products
Get warnings in orders for products or customers
Make your quote attractive by adding header pages, product descriptions and footer pages to your quote.
No longer edit orders once confirmed
Allows you to send Pro-Forma Invoice to your customers
Compute shipping costs on orders

setting.div: UPS Connector

Compute shipping costs and ship with UPS
(please go to Home>Apps to install)
DHL Connector

Compute shipping costs and ship with DHL
(please go to Home>Apps to install)
FedEx Connector

Compute shipping costs and ship with FedEx
(please go to Home>Apps to install)
USPS Connector

Compute shipping costs and ship with USPS
(please go to Home>Apps to install)

setting.help: Compute shipping costs and ship with bpost
Compute shipping costs and ship with Easypost
Compute shipping costs and ship with Sendcloud
Compute shipping costs and ship with Shiprocket
Quantities to invoice from sales orders
setting.title: This default value is applied to any new product created. This can be changed in the product detail form.

setting.help: Generate the invoice automatically when the online payment is confirmed
Product used for down payments
Import Amazon orders and sync deliveries
Synchronize your calendar with Outlook

div.div: Savethis page and come back here to set up the feature.

setting.help: Synchronize your calendar with Google Calendar

div.div: Savethis page and come back here to set up the feature.

field.name: website_id
field.title: Settings on this page will apply to this website

field.name: website_domain
field.title: Display this website when users visit this domain

field.name: website_homepage_url
field.title: Main page of your website served to visitors

field.name: website_company_id
field.title: The company this website belongs to

setting.help: Support most payment methods; Visa, Mastercard, Maestro, Google Pay, Apple Pay, etc. as well as recurring charges.

div.title: Stripe Connect is not available in your country, please use another payment provider.

setting.help: Alows your visitors to chat with you
Allows to do mass mailing campaigns to contacts
Display a customizable cookies bar on your website
Accounts are usable across all your multiple websites
Let your customers log in to see their documents
setting.title: To send invitations in B2B mode, open a contact or select several ones in list view and click on 'Portal Access Management' option in the dropdown menu *Action*.

setting.help: Track visits using Google Analytics

div.a: How to get my Measurement ID

setting.help: Use a CDN to optimize the availability of your website's content
setting.title: A CDN helps you serve your website’s content with high availability and high performance to any visitor wherever they are located.

setting.help: Robots.txt: This file tells to search engine crawlers which pages or files they can or can't request from your site.
Sitemap.xml: Help search engine crawlers to find out what pages are present and which have recently changed, and to crawl your site accordingly. This file is automatically generated by Odoo.
setting.div: Google doesn't need to be pinged anymore. It will automatically fetch your /sitemap.xml.

setting.help: If set, replaces the website logo as the default social share image.
Monitor Google Search results data

div.small: : type some of the first chars after 'google' is enough, we'll guess the rest.

setting.help: Use Plausible.io, Simple and privacy-friendly Google Analytics alternative

div.a: How to create my Plausible Shared Link

setting.help: Request managers to approve orders above a minimum amount
Automatically lock confirmed orders to prevent editing
Get warnings in orders for products or vendors
Manage your purchase agreements (call for tenders, blanket orders)
setting.title: Calls for tenders are when you want to generate requests for quotations with several vendors for a given set of products to compare offers.

setting.help: Automatically remind the receipt date to your vendors
Quantities billed by vendors
setting.title: This default value is applied to any new product created. This can be changed in the product detail form.

setting.help: Make sure you only pay bills for which you received the goods you ordered
setting.title: If enabled, activates 3-way matching on vendor bills : the items must be received in order to pay the invoice.

setting.help: Purchase variants of a product using attributes (size, color, etc.)
Add several variants to the purchase order from a grid
setting.title: If installed, the product variants will be added to purchase orders through a grid entry.

setting.help: Purchase products by multiple of unit # per package
setting.title: Ability to select a package type in purchase orders and to force a quantity that is a multiple of the number of units per package.

setting.help: Sell and purchase products in different units of measure
Request your vendors to deliver to your customers
setting.title: This adds a dropshipping route to apply on products in order to request your vendors to deliver to your customers. A product to dropship will generate a purchase request for quotation once the sales order confirmed. This is a on-demand flow. The requested delivery address will be the customer delivery address and not your warehouse.

setting.help: Put your products in packs (e.g. parcels, boxes) and track them
setting.title: Put your products in packs (e.g. parcels, boxes) and track them

setting.help: Process transfers in batch per worker

div.div: Process operations in wave transfers

setting.help: Get informative or blocking warnings on partners
When to start shipping
Add quality checks to your transfer operations

div.div: Create customizable worksheets for your quality checks

setting.help: Day and month that annual inventory counts should occur.
View and allocate received quantities.
Process operations faster with barcodes
Send an automatic confirmation email when Delivery Orders are done
Send an automatic confirmation SMS Text Message when Delivery Orders are done
Require a signature on your delivery orders
Compute shipping costs
setting.title: Shipping connectors allow to compute accurate shipping costs, print shipping labels and request carrier picking at your warehouse to ship to the customer. Apply shipping connector from delivery methods.

setting.help: Compute shipping costs and ship with UPS
setting.div: UPS Connector

Compute shipping costs and ship with UPS
(please go to Home>Apps to install)

setting.help: Compute shipping costs and ship with DHL
setting.div: DHL Connector

Compute shipping costs and ship with DHL
(please go to Home>Apps to install)

setting.help: Compute shipping costs and ship with FedEx
setting.div: FedEx Connector

Compute shipping costs and ship with FedEx
(please go to Home>Apps to install)

setting.help: Compute shipping costs and ship with USPS
setting.div: USPS Connector

Compute shipping costs and ship with USPS
(please go to Home>Apps to install)

setting.help: Compute shipping costs and ship with bpost
Compute shipping costs and ship with Easypost
Compute shipping costs and ship with Sendcloud
Compute shipping costs and ship with Shiprocket
Set product attributes (e.g. color, size) to manage variants
Sell and purchase products in different units of measure
Manage product packagings (e.g. pack of 6 bottles, box of 10 pieces)
setting.title: Manage product packagings (e.g. pack of 6 bottles, box of 10 pieces)

setting.help: Get a full traceability from vendors to customers

div.div: Use GS1 nomenclature datamatrix whenever barcodes are printed for lots and serial numbers.

setting.help: Set expiration dates on lots & serial numbers
setting.title: Track following dates on lots & serial numbers: best before, removal, end of life, alert. Such dates are set automatically at lot/serial number creation based on values set on the product (in days).

setting.help: Lots & Serial numbers will appear on the delivery slip
Set owner on stored products
Add additional cost (transport, customs, ...) in the value of the product.
setting.title: Affect landed costs on reception operations and split them among products to update their cost price.

setting.help: Lots & Serial numbers will appear on the invoice
Track product location in your warehouse
setting.title: Store products in specific locations of your warehouse (e.g. bins, racks) and to track inventory accordingly.

setting.help: Use your own routes
setting.title: Add and customize route operations to process product moves in your warehouse(s): e.g. unload > quality control > stock for incoming products, pick > pack > ship for outgoing products. You can also set putaway strategies on warehouse locations in order to send incoming products into specific child locations straight away (e.g. specific bins, racks).

setting.help: Categorize your locations for smarter putaway rules
Schedule deliveries earlier to avoid delays
setting.title: Margin of error for dates promised to customers. Products will be scheduled for procurement and delivery that many days earlier than the actual promised date, to cope with unexpected delays in the supply chain.

div.span: Move forward expected delivery dates bydays

setting.help: Schedule request for quotations earlier to avoid delays
setting.name: schedule_receivings_setting_container
setting.title: Margin of error for vendor lead times. When the system generates Purchase Orders for reordering products,they will be scheduled that many days earlier to cope with unexpected vendor delays.

div.span: Move forward expected request creation date bydays

setting.help: Days needed to confirm a PO
Request your vendors to deliver to your customers
setting.title: This adds a dropshipping route to apply on products in order to request your vendors to deliver to your customers. A product to dropship will generate a purchase request for quotation once the sales order confirmed. This is a on-demand flow. The requested delivery address will be the customer delivery address and not your warehouse.

setting.help: Taxes, fiscal positions, chart of accounts & legal statements for your country

button.name: reload_template
button.title: Reload accounting data (taxes, accounts, ...) if you notice inconsistencies. This action is irreversible.

setting.help: Default taxes applied to local transactions
setting.title: These taxes are set in any new product created.

setting.help: How total tax amount is computed in orders and invoices
setting.title: A rounding per line is advised if your prices are tax-included. That way, the sum of line subtotals equals the total with taxes.

setting.help: Compute tax rates based on U.S. ZIP codes
Automatically compute tax rates
Apply VAT of the EU country to which goods and services are delivered.
setting.title: If you sell goods and services to customers in a foreign EU country, you must charge VAT based on the delivery address. This rule applies regardless of where you are located.

setting.help: Allow to configure taxes using cash basis
setting.title: Select this if the taxes should use cash basis, which will create an entry for such taxes on a given account during reconciliation.

setting.help: Domestic country of your accounting
Main currency of your company
Update exchange rates automatically
Those options will be selected by default when clicking "Send & Print" on invoices
Send invoices and payment follow-ups by post
Select specific invoice and delivery addresses
Get warnings when invoicing specific customers
Define the smallest coinage of the currency used to pay by cash
Collect information and produce statistics on the trade in goods in Europe with intrastat
Default Incoterm of your company
Activate to create sale receipt
Add your terms & conditions at the bottom of invoices/orders/quotations
Trigger alerts when creating Invoices and Sales Orders for Partners with a Total Receivable amount exceeding a limit. Set a value greater than 0.0 to activate a credit limit check
Display the total amount of an invoice in letters
Let your customers pay their invoices online
Group payments into a single batch to ease the reconciliation process
Collect customer payments in one-click using Euro SEPA Service
setting.title: If you check this box, you will be able to collect payments using SEPA Direct Debit mandates.

div.div: Save this page and come back here to set up the feature.

setting.help: Add a payment QR-code to your invoices
setting.title: Add a QR-code to your invoices so that your customers can pay instantly with their mobile banking application.

setting.help: Activate to create purchase receipt
Print checks to pay your vendors
Pay your bills in one-click using Euro SEPA Service
setting.title: If you check this box, you will be able to register your payment using SEPA.

setting.help: Digitize your PDF or scanned documents with OCR and Artificial Intelligence

div.div: Save this page and come back here to set up the feature.

setting.string: Post bank transactions and payments in:

setting.title: If empty, the discount will be discounted directly on the income/expense account. If set, discount on invoices will be realized in separate accounts.

setting.help: Import your bank statements in CSV, XLS, and XLSX
setting.title: Once installed, set 'Bank Feeds' to 'File Import' in bank account settings.This adds a button to import from the Accounting dashboard.

setting.help: Import your bank statements in QIF
setting.title: Once installed, set 'Bank Feeds' to 'File Import' in bank account settings.This adds a button to import from the Accounting dashboard.

setting.help: Import your bank statements in OFX
setting.title: Once installed, set 'Bank Feeds' to 'File Import' in bank account settings.This adds a button to import from the Accounting dashboard.

setting.help: Import your bank statements in CAMT.053
setting.title: Once installed, set 'Bank Feeds' to 'File Import' in bank account settings.This adds a button to import from the Accounting dashboard.

setting.help: Navigate easily through reports and see what is behind the numbers
Track costs & revenues by project, department, etc
setting.title: Allows you to use the analytic accounting.

setting.help: Use budgets to compare actual with expected revenues and costs
setting.title: This allows accountants to manage analytic and crossovered budgets. Once the master budgets and the budgets are defined, the project managers can set the planned amount on each analytic account.

setting.help: Monitor your product margins from invoices

div.div: Allow sending and receiving invoices through the PEPPOL network

setting.help: Use Storno accounting
setting.title: Allows you to use Storno accounting.

div.p: Accounting firm mode will change invoice/bill encoding:
- The document's sequence becomes editable on all documents.
- A new field « Total (tax inc.) » to speed up and control the encoding by automating line creation with the right account & tax.
- A default Customer Invoice / Vendor Bill date will be suggested.

setting.title: Presence of employees

setting.help: Presence reporting screen, email and IP address control.
setting.title: Advanced presence of employees

div.span: Minimum number of emails to send

setting.help: Enrich employee profiles with skills and resumes
Display remote work settings for each employee and dedicated reports. Presence icons will be updated with remote work location.
Set default company schedule to manage your employees working time
Allow employees to update their own data
setting.title: Allow employees to update their own data.

app.name: point_of_sale

field.name: pos_config_id
field.title: Settings on this page will apply to this point of sale.

div.p: Please create/select a Point of Sale above to show the configuration options.

app.div: A session is currently opened for this PoS. Some settings can only be changed after the session is closed.Click here to close the session
There is no Chart of Accounts configured on the company. Please go to the invoicing settings to install a Chart of Accounts.

div.div: Save this page and come back here to set up the feature.

setting.help: Payment methods available
Automatically validates orders paid with a payment terminal.
Define the smallest coinage of the currency used to pay by cash
Set a maximum difference allowed between the expected and counted money during the closing of the session
Accept customer tips or convert their change to a tip
setting.title: This product is used as reference on customer receipts.

block.title: PoS Interface
block.div: There is no Chart of Accounts configured on the company. Please go to the invoicing settings to install a Chart of Accounts.

setting.help: Start selling from a default product category
Allow to log and switch between selected Employees
setting.title: Employees can scan their badge or enter a PIN to log in to a PoS session. These credentials are configurable in the *HR Settings* tab of the employee form.

setting.help: Pick which product categories are available
Improve navigation for imprecise industrial touchscreens
Show margins & costs on product information
Allow to access each other's active orders

field.name: pos_trusted_config_ids
field.placeholder: Select PoS to start sharing orders

setting.title: This tax is applied to any new product created in the catalog.

i.title: This setting is common to all PoS.

setting.div: Default sales tax for products

i.title: This setting is common to all PoS.

setting.div: Intermediary account used for unidentified customers.

setting.help: Use fiscal positions to get different taxes by order
setting.title: Choose a specific fiscal position at the order depending on the kind of customer (tax exempt, onsite vs. takeaway, etc.).

setting.help: Default journals for orders and invoices

div.title: Whenever you close a session, one entry is generated in the following accounting journal for all the orders not invoiced. Invoices are recorded in accounting separately.

setting.help: Sales are reported to the following sales team
This product will be applied when down payment is made
Set multiple prices per product, automated discounts, etc.
Restrict price modification to managers
setting.title: Only users with Manager access rights for PoS app can modify the product prices on orders.

setting.help: Product prices on receipts
Allow cashiers to set a discount per line
Adds a button to set a global discount

div.div: Save this page and come back here to set up the feature.

setting.help: Manage promotion that will grant customers discounts or gifts
setting.string: Promotions, Coupons, Gift Card & Loyalty Program
setting.title: Boost your sales with multiple kinds of programs: Coupons, Promotions, Gift Card, Loyalty. Specific conditions can be set (products, customers, minimum purchase amount, period). Rewards can be discounts (% or amount) or free products.

setting.help: Add a custom message to header and footer

field.name: pos_receipt_footer
field.placeholder: e.g. Return Policy, Thanks for shopping with us!

setting.help: Print receipts automatically once the payment is registered

div.invisible: not pos_iface_print_auto or not pos_is_posbox and not pos_other_devices

setting.help: Print a QR code on the receipt to allow the user to easily request the invoice for an order.
Add a 5-digit code on the receipt to allow the user to request the invoice for an order on the portal.
Generation of your order references

block.help: Those settings are common to all PoS.
block.title: Payment Terminals

setting.help: Accept payments with an Adyen payment terminal
setting.title: The transactions are processed by Adyen. Set your Adyen credentials on the related payment method.

setting.help: Accept payments with a Stripe payment terminal
setting.title: The transactions are processed by Stripe. Set your Stripe credentials on the related payment method.

setting.help: Accept payments with a Vantiv payment terminal
setting.title: The transactions are processed by Vantiv. Set your Vantiv credentials on the related payment method.

setting.help: Accept payments with a Six payment terminal
setting.title: The transactions are processed by Six. Set the IP address of the terminal on the related payment method.

setting.help: Accept payments with a PayTM payment terminal
setting.title: The transactions are processed by PayTM. Set your PayTM credentials on the related payment method.

setting.help: Connect device to your PoS without an IoT Box

div.invisible: not pos_iface_print_via_proxy or not pos_other_devices or pos_epson_printer_ip in [False, '']

setting.div: The Epson receipt printer will be used instead of the receipt printer connected to the IoT Box.

setting.help: Show checkout to customers through a second display
Connect devices using an IoT Box
Print orders at the kitchen, at the bar, etc.
Display orders on the preparation display
Used to record product pickings. Products are consumed from its default source location.
setting.title: Operation types show up in the Inventory dashboard.

setting.help: Sell products and deliver them later.

i.title: This setting is common to all PoS.

setting.div: Use barcodes to scan products, customer cards, etc.

setting.help: Update quantities in stock
